output.code: import json, re, unicodedata, os, itertools, math, textwrap, sys, collections, difflib, statistics
import json, pathlib, sys, re, unicodedata, difflib, itertools, collections, math, statistics, os, textwrap

quran_path="/mnt/data/file-RhatJL6W5hpishQfBLfQ2a-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path="/mnt/data/file-GKgoPWB6fR896BnuZfjrBZ-six_hadith_books.json"
with open(quran_path,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran=json.load(f)
with open(hadith_path,'r',encoding='utf-8') as f:
    hadith=json.load(f)
len(quran), len(hadith)

def normalize(s):
    s=str(s)
    # remove tashkeel
    s=re.sub(r'[\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', s)
    # tatweel
    s=s.replace('ـ','')
    # unify hamza forms
    s=s.replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('آ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي').replace('ة','ه')
    # punctuation
    s=re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # spaces
    s=re.sub(r'\s+',' ',s).strip()
    return s

orig_full="مَا كَانَ لِفُؤَادٍ أَنْ يَأْمَنَ مَا تُبْدِي لَهُ السَامِعُونَ"
snippet="مَا كَانَ ...سَامِعُونَ"
norm_full=normalize(orig_full)
norm_full

# search in quran for substring
matches_q=[]
for v in quran:
    t=v.get('ayah_text','')
    if normalize(t).find(norm_full)!=-1:
        matches_q.append(t)
len(matches_q)

# list ayat containing فؤاد
ayat_fuad=[v['ayah_text'] for v in quran if 'فُؤَاد' in v['ayah_text'] or 'فؤاد' in normalize(v['ayah_text'])]
len(ayat_fuad), ayat_fuad[:10]
any('السَّامِعُون' in v['ayah_text'] or 'السامعون' in normalize(v['ayah_text']) for v in quran)

# search hadith substring
matches_h=[]
for h in hadith:
    t=h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('Matn') or ''
    if normalize(t).find(norm_full)!=-1:
        matches_h.append(t)
len(matches_h)

# approximate top hadith
def htext(h):
    return h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('Matn') or ''
top_h=sorted([(SequenceMatcher(None, normalize(htext(h)), norm_full).ratio(), htext(h)) for h in hadith], reverse=True)[:10]
[top_h[0][0], top_h[0][1][:200]]

# find Al-Ahzab 33:50 text from quran db; need fields? Let's inspect an entry
quran[0].keys()

# find surah_name contains الاحزاب and ayah_id 50 maybe ayah_id is within surah; need check structure
# Let's list entries for surah Al-Ahzab
ahzab=[v for v in quran if 'الأحزاب' in v['surah_name'] or 'الاحزاب' in normalize(v['surah_name'])]
len(ahzab), ahzab[0]['surah_name'], ahzab[0]['ayah_id']

# get ayah 50
ayah50=[v for v in ahzab if v['ayah_id']==50]
len(ayah50), ayah50[0]['ayah_text'][:120]

content.text: {"correction":"يَا أَيُّهَا النَّبِيُّ إِنَّا أَحْلَلْنَا لَكَ أَزْوَاجَكَ اللَّاتِي آتَيْتَ أُجُورَهُنَّ وَمَا مَلَكَتْ يَمِينُكَ مِمَّا أَفَاءَ اللَّهُ عَلَيْكَ وَبَنَاتِ عَمِّكَ وَبَنَاتِ عَمَّاتِكَ وَبَنَاتِ خَالِكَ وَبَنَاتِ خَالَاتِكَ اللَّاتِي هَاجَرْنَ مَعَكَ وَامْرَأَةً مُؤْمِنَةً إِنْ وَهَبَتْ نَفْسَهَا لِلنَّبِيِّ إِنْ أَرَادَ النَّبِيُّ أَنْ يَسْتَنْكِحَهَا خَالِصَةً لَكَ مِنْ دُونِ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ۗ قَدْ عَلِمْنَا مَا فَرَضْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ فِي أَزْوَاجِهِمْ وَمَا مَلَكَتْ أَيْمَانُهُمْ لِكَيْلَا يَكُونَ عَلَيْكَ حَرَجٌ ۗ وَكَانَ اللَّهُ غَفُورًا رَحِيمًا"}
